title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node ≥ 18 and modern browsers via fetch.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama for chains, agents, and RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama; manage models, chats, documents, and users in one place.

title: llama-cpp-python
summary: Python bindings for llama.cpp; commonly used alongside Ollama for low-level GGUF model access.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in production-ready pipelines.

title: OllamaKit (Swift)
summary: Swift package that wraps Ollama’s REST API for macOS/iOS apps with async/await and Combine publishers.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Lightweight proxy that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-compatible completion endpoint.

title: ollama4j (Java)
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and autoscaling.

title: ollama-rb (Ruby gem)
summary: Ruby client for Ollama with ActiveModel-style interfaces and background job helpers.

title: ollama-cli (Go)
summary: Unofficial Go CLI with interactive REPL, model tagging, and progress bars for pulls.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model using slash commands.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n node to integrate Ollama models into no-code automation workflows.

title: ollama-dbee (CLI SQL)
summary: Plugin for DBeaver that adds SQL query generation and explanation via local Ollama models.

title: ollama-vscode
summary: VS Code extension that adds inline code generation, refactoring, and chat side-panel using Ollama.

title: ollama-powershell
summary: PowerShell module to manage and query Ollama models from Windows, Linux, or macOS terminals.

title: ollama-c# (.NET)
summary: .NET 8 client library and CLI for Ollama with dependency injection helpers and minimal API samples.

title: ollama-unreal
summary: Unreal Engine 5 plugin exposing Ollama as an AI subsystem for in-game chat NPCs and tooling.
